name: Trip cancellation claim process
description: User had to cancel trip due to medical emergency and wants to claim

input.message: I had to cancel my international trip to Europe because my father was hospitalised. I have TATA AIG travel insurance. Can I claim trip cancellation? What documents do I need?

notes: Must explain: Trip cancellation due to family medical emergency is typically covered. Documents: medical certificate, hospital admission proof, flight/hotel cancellation receipts, original booking confirmations, policy copy. Must file within 30 days typically.
